Off Calendar Jul-29-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. RICHARD F. MUNZINGER OF THE SHARTSIS FRIESE LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 1-415-515-8494 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
ATTY. EDWARD O. LEAR OF THE CENTURY LAW GROUP LLP, TEL. NO. 1-310-642-6900 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT PEIKIN BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE MATTER WAS CALLED TWICE ON THE RECORD. THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS : PETITIONER SHARTSIS FRIESE LLP'S Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order And Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment is Granted in the amount of $1,076,417.93. Undertaking in the amount of $250,000.00 to be posted. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489
